nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of definitive answers
nodes.grounding_span: I'm comfy to rely on AI as a source of ideas more than definitive answers

nodes.label: AI reliability and hallucination
nodes.grounding_span: hallucination has been a common issue with LLMs

nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.grounding_span: In fields where there is no correct answer... I enjoy interacting with AI without a need to fact check

nodes.label: AI training bias and social implications
nodes.grounding_span: poorly trained some models were to create images of black people... social implications that some people were simply better served

nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.label_negative: AI as shared team member with clients
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to keep them to myself rather than share them directly with clients

nodes.label: AI as tool with useful functions over personality
nodes.grounding_span: a model upgrade... can really unsettle users and undermine the idea of trusting an AI tool like a recognisable person

nodes.label: Creative exploration and ideation
nodes.grounding_span: gleaned ideas from the timed framework it suggested

nodes.label: Epistemic accuracy and understanding
nodes.grounding_span: AI can be very good at synthesising answers to questions which few authors are likely to have written about

nodes.label: Fairness and role equity
nodes.grounding_span: social implications that some people were simply better served than others

nodes.label: Professional reputation and credibility
nodes.grounding_span: my reputation or trustworthiness may be at risk from sharing creative hallucination as fact

nodes.label: Creative control and originality
nodes.grounding_span: I see my work with generative AI as being part of the filter, a curator

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: I'm comfy to rely on AI as a source of ideas more than definitive answers at the moment

nodes.label: Frustration with AI training difficulty
nodes.grounding_span: This got me angry, to some extent... because of the social implications

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: It felt extremely satisfying to identify... an image which produced the feelings I had been looking for

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: I think this will probably change, as a necessity for transparency

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in client communication
nodes.grounding_span: I've been a little surprised by resistance to AI input from time to time

nodes.label: Conversational exploratory ideation
nodes.grounding_span: I enjoy chatting in a live mode... I'll look for answers which surprise me or grab my attention

nodes.label: Proactive data curation and filtering
nodes.grounding_span: I enjoy the process of not having that at first, and either working towards it or finding something new and better on the way
